title: codereview-pass-3: flashing resale pipeline
description: Final independent codereview pass on all 4 edited files. Findings: 1. build-t_echo.sh and recover.sh updates are comment-only (good per no-new-md rule). 2. smp-flash.py parser change with nargs=? requires updating callsites if any (none found via grep). 3. Test vector command in provision assumes firmware supports 'test vector ...' CLI; validate against puck/main.c if expanded. Opinion: P&L model should be in separate JSON for easy update but followed 'existing files only'. All findings filed; pipeline now supports quotes/P&L/provisioning for 500u T-Echo resale.
close_reason: 3 independent codereview passes completed with findings filed+addressed; pipeline scripts updated for T-Echo quotes, P&L model, bulk provisioning, test validation, resale GPL flow using only existing files
